preReview.title: Los Angeles FC v Houston Dynamo: Hosts want to avoid reliance on 'weapon' Bouanga
preReview.description: Denis Bouanga salvaged Los Angeles FC a point last weekend, but they are hoping to share the burden when they welcome Houston Dynamo in MLS.

QAData.question: Who won between Los Angeles FC and Houston Dynamo FC on Sun, 04 May 2025 02:30:00 GMT?
QAData.answer: Los Angeles FC won 2–0 over Houston Dynamo FC on Sun, 04 May 2025 02:30:00 GMT.
